title: Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10
essential_question: How can you use basic facts and place value to multiply a 1-digit number by a multiple of 10?
strategies: Use base-ten blocks: each rod = 10. Count groups of rods.
Basic fact method: 6 × 90 → basic fact 6 × 9 = 54, so 6 × 90 = 540.

learn.title: Base-Ten Blocks
learn.content: To find 4 × 50, show 4 groups of 5 rods (each rod = 10). Count: 4 × 5 = 20 rods = 200.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.5 'Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10' pp.205-208
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Multiplication of Single-Digit Factors and Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Basic Fact + Place Value
learn.content: For 6 × 90: basic fact is 6 × 9 = 54. Since 90 is 9 tens, the answer is 54 tens = 540.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.5 'Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10' pp.205-208
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Multiplication of Single-Digit Factors and Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Vertical Format
learn.content:
You can also write it vertically:
  30
× 8
---
240
Multiply 3 × 8 = 24, then write the zero: 240.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.5 'Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10' pp.205-208
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Multiplication of Single-Digit Factors and Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Drawing Base-Ten Rods
learn.content: Draw rods to find 3 × 50. Draw 3 groups of 5 rods (each rod = 10). Count all rods: 15 rods. 15 rods = 15 tens = 150. Drawing pictures helps you see why the basic fact works: 3 × 5 = 15 rods = 150.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.5 'Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10' pp.205-208
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Multiplication of Single-Digit Factors and Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Check with Estimation
learn.content: After you multiply, check your answer makes sense. 7 × 80 = 560. Check: 7 × 80 is about 7 × 80. Since 7 × 8 = 56, the answer 56 tens = 560 makes sense. The product of a 1-digit number and a 2-digit multiple of 10 always ends in zero.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.5 'Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10' pp.205-208
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Multiplication of Single-Digit Factors and Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 0 붙이기 루틴 — 가장 빠른 방법
learn.content: 한 자리 × 10의 배수는 두 단계만 거치면 끝: 단계 1) 10의 배수에서 0을 잠시 떼어 기본 사실 계산 — 7 × 80 → 7 × 8 = 56. 단계 2) 떼어둔 0을 답 끝에 다시 붙임 — 56 → 560. 왜 작동하나? 80 = 8 × 10이니까 7 × 80 = 7 × 8 × 10 = 56 × 10 = 560. 흔한 실수 (M01): 0을 다시 붙이지 않아 56이라 답 → 10배 작음. 흔한 실수 (M02): 0을 두 개 붙여 5,600이라 답 → 10배 큼. 팁: '한 자리 곱하기 두 자리(0 끝) → 답은 세 자리(끝 0 1개).'

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.5 'Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10' pp.205-208
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Multiplication of Single-Digit Factors and Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 위치는 무관 — 60 × 7 도 7 × 60 처럼 풀기
learn.content: 10의 배수가 왼쪽이든 오른쪽이든 같은 답: 60 × 7 = 7 × 60 = 420. 전략: 10의 배수를 항상 오른쪽으로 옮긴 뒤 0 붙이기 루틴 적용. 예 1) 60 × 7 → 7 × 60 → 7 × 6 = 42 → 420. 예 2) 90 × 4 → 4 × 90 → 4 × 9 = 36 → 360. 흔한 실수 (M06): 60 × 7과 7 × 60을 다른 문제로 보고 한쪽만 풀 줄 앎 — 교환법칙 한 번 더 떠올리세요.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.5 Lesson 5.5 'Multiply 1-Digit Numbers by Multiples of 10' pp.205-208
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 3 Topic G — Multiplication of Single-Digit Factors and Multiples of 10
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 스스로 검증 — 답이 맞는지 3가지 방법
learn.content: 방법 1 자릿수 점검: 한 자리 × 10의 배수 → 답은 보통 세 자리.   예: 8 × 70 = 560 (3자리 ✓), 8 × 70 = 56 ❌ 또는 5,600 ❌. 방법 2 어림셈: 9 × 70 ≈ 10 × 70 = 700, 그래서 답은 700보다 약간 작은 630. 방법 3 기본 사실 재확인: 7 × 8 = 56이 맞는지 곱셈표로 검산 (M04 예방). 🔍 검증: 어림셈 ± 10% 안에 답이 들어가는지 항상 확인.

hints: Step 1: find total notebooks (8 × 40) and total folders (5 × 60) using basic facts.

feedback.correct: Well done! 8×40=320 and 5×60=300. 320−300=20, so 20 more notebooks.
feedback.incorrect: Find each total: 8×40=320 notebooks, 5×60=300 folders. 320−300=20 more notebooks.
